title: notothlaspi australe
intro: Notothlaspi australe, also known as Australian peppercress, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe irritated skin and wounds. The plant is rich in various nutrients and compounds that contribute to its health benefits, including the reduction of inflammation, improvement of digestion, and support of the immune system. Notothlaspi australe can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
